message:
test(e2e): add CLI integration tests for startup migration system

- Add e2e_cli_startup_migrations_run_by_default: verifies the full
  startup migration pipeline executes on a fresh agent directory
  containing legacy artifacts (oauth.json, settings.json, legacy
  session, commands/, tools/) — asserts migration completes and
  export still functions correctly post-migration
- Tests exercise the encode_cwd helper imported from session module
  for path-based session discovery in migrated layouts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
